chapter_title.en: Chapter 65 – the Time for Night Prayer

text: 1376 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَقْتُ صَلاَةِ اَللَّيْلِ مَا بَيْنَ نِصْفِ اَللَّيْلِ إِلَى آخِرِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1376 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"The time for the night prayer (salat al-layl) is from midnight until its end."
